I just realized Radio Lab gets it.
I mean like, it just seems scientists are so eager to tell us the awesome shit they know that they forget it’s only awesome with context
I was not mentally equipped to understand the true magnitude of that fact. How is this not understood? Why is there middle school science?
For instance, at a young age I was taught the fact the earth has a molten core. Years later, I learn THE EARTHS CORE IS AS HOT AS THE SUN!!!
I love learning things that someone failed to teach me once, but now I am super into. Some things are really cool but children don’t get.
